arts.ttl: Nantes predicted XI v Rennes: Pedro Chirivella and Nathan Zézé return
arts.sum: Nantes FC welcome back three key players for Friday night’s Breton derby against Stade Rennais. Nanthan Zézé, Jean-Charles Castelletto, and Pedro Chirivella will all return to Antoine Kombouaré’s matchday squad. …

arts.sum: Habib Beye doesn’t have any fresh injury concerns as Stade Rennais prepare to host FC Nantes in a Breton derby on Friday night. Alidu Seidu, who suffered an ACL injury…

arts.ttl: Rennes vs Nantes Prediction: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Where To Watch
arts.sum: Rennes, sitting mid-table, host Nantes, who are just a few places below them, in a Ligue 1 clash on Friday, April 18, 2025, at 19:45 GMT. Both teams will be aiming to secure a valuable victory to impr...
